offer: For accounting firms processing 5–15 invoices/month, manual formatting causes delays in report delivery. We automate report generation instead of manual report generation using spreadsheets.
problem: Manual formatting of compliance reports from vendor payment records is time-consuming and error-prone.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for accounting firms
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to accounting firms with demo video
Community forums for accounting tools and resources
try_it: Let users try template-based report generation on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a demo video of the manual workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow saving common inputs as templates
Enable CSV import for existing data
